message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 162 progress comment

RusticMaple: Command::output_with_cx. Bridges cx cancel into
existing cancel AtomicBool via dedicated watcher task polling at
PROCESS_POLL_INTERVAL. Test pins contract: cx cancelled after 100ms
surfaces as ErrorKind::Interrupted with elapsed < 2s even though
child process is sleep 10. runtime_compat.rs cx coverage 14/14.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
